productDisplayName: Nike Men As Goaline Ss Black T-Shirts
description: CompositionBlack t-shirt made of Dri-Fit polyester fabric, with mesh panels in contrast colour on the sides, short sleeves, round neck with fabric tape inseam and heat transferred swoosh logo on left chestFittingComfortWash CareMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not use softeners or bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediately/do not allow fabric to lie on itself when wetCool iron, but do not iron on designDo not dry cleanDesigned for absolute comfort and style, this t-shirt from nike is a must-have in your wardrobe. Engineered with Dri-Fit technology, it keeps sweat at bay offering a fresh all-day feel, while you enjoy your sporting events in on a hot day. Team this with performance clothes and shoes for unparalleled cool.
